top_signals.title: Gen Z craze toy maker Jellycat launches legal action against Next and Hamleys
top_signals.summary: Jellycat, the British soft toy company that took the interview by storm, has filed several legal actions in the London High Court over trademark allegations. Lawyers at Stephenson Harwood filed three separate lawsuits last week against retail giants over passing off and trademark allegations. The firm, founded by brothers Thomas and William Gatacre, has an [...]
